protocol.mechanism: exact 1D monotone transport between side-aligned buy-flow and sell-flow return-response distributions
protocol.final_grid: 2 lookbacks x 2 fit-only score tails x 2 holds
protocol.design_history: two earlier pre-2024 researcher probes used within-window flow terciles with W1 coherence and a trailing-median innovation variant; both were weak. Their 16 policies plus this final 8-policy WFRS family are contaminated and frozen.
protocol.flow_tail: q70 absolute taker imbalance fit only
protocol.response_scale: current completed bar log(close/open) divided by prior-only 7d bar-return volatility and clipped to +/-5
protocol.decision: open-time timestamp minute 55 completed at next hour, then enter following minute-00 open
protocol.contamination_note: 2023 is inspected internal selection; 2024+ remained sealed
